message: Jake
Tonny
Anyway, let's go inside.
Since it's still early, the bar is empty, as if it were reserved just for us.
Here, we can talk without interruptions. I'm in a good mood today, so feel free to ask me anything.
Look
Talk
Listen
Show
System
Surroundings
About Ginny
About Guy
About Jennifer
About Meryl
Ginnie's ring
Save
Exit the game
In the empty bar, a stage is set in the corner, and the overall structure is calm and luxurious.
Since there's still time before the bar opens, there are no customers in sight. Usually, this is a place I wouldn’t dare to step into.
He seems more energetic than during the day. It's probably due to years of habits, but he’s the type to regain his vitality with sunset.
Despite being in a membership club with quite a few restrictions, he shows no signs of hesitation at all.
At a glance, he seems like an understanding, unpretentious man, but sometimes a sneering arrogance slips through his gestures.
In the corner of his forced smile, there's a hint of impatience, wishing to wrap up the conversation with me.
Ah, it’s already this time. I have work to do now.
Sorry for being here until this hour.
No, it's fine. More importantly,
I’d like to rescue Ginny while she’s still alive.
I wish I could do that, but I think it’s better to report it to the police.
No, Gabriella won't do that. It’s more accurate to say she can’t.
I’ll take care of this.
Saying that,
He stood up from his seat first. At that moment, something shiny fell at his feet.
Is this a surgical scalpel? Why would he have something like this?
By the time I got to the entrance,
his figure was already gone, and that scalpel had unintentionally become my responsibility.
Still,
I'm worried about Ginny's life and death.
Jennifer, Meryl, and Ginny are in a fierce battle over Director Fabar.
But that being said,
women are scary. If their lives are at risk, cutting off their left hand is nothing.
He’s not the kind of guy who could do something like that.
What does that even mean?
Ginnie's ring was delivered along with her left hand. In other words, Ginny currently has no left hand.
No way,
please don't tell me a bad joke.
There's no way to joke about something like this.
Then the culprit can’t possibly be Guy.
That's right, he couldn't do something like that.
I see.
I have an idea of who the culprit might be.
Huh?!
It’s either Jennifer or Meryl who did it.
You thought I was doing something to Ginny, didn’t you?
I didn’t think the last customer was the culprit.
Is that really true? Well, that’s not important; after all, it’s Guy who looks suspicious.
Wait a minute. Guy is—
Guy is not the kind of man who would do that.
Why do you think you can understand his heart better than a stranger like you? She pretended not to be obsessed, but actually was even more obsessed with him.
I believe that's just not the case. First of all, he isn’t the type to do something like that.
That Ginny is missing...
What happened to that girl?
So, I'll be straightforward about it. Ginny from Gabriela's place has gone missing.
Is that really true? Is there some talk behind the scenes about separating me from Ginny?
Separate?
Why would that even come up?
Well then,
so is it true that Ginny is really missing!?
Is Gabriela's request related to Ginny?
We talked about this when I visited your place before.
Heh, I see.
I was feeling down that day, so I tried to distract myself a bit.
So, did you take on any task from Gabriela?
Yes, I did.
No way, is it that?
About the payment?
Payment? No, it’s nothing like that.
I see, so it’s not that.
Then what on earth is this about?
This place is members-only, and the atmosphere and service here are fantastic.
It's my first time stepping inside.
That's right. Just having money won't get you membership here; only those with social status and reputation qualify.
Maybe it’s still early, but there’s no one else here but us.
This place opens whenever a customer wants, but if there are no appointments, they close for the day.
According to Gabriela, you were Ginny's last customer.
Saying 'customer' is rude. I was in love with that girl. We had a financial contract, but it was pure love.
Wait a minute. Are you saying she’s been missing since I last saw her?
Unfortunately, at this point, the last I knew of her actions was when you last met.
At that time, if I had forced him to stay, maybe this wouldn’t have happened.
That day, I invited her over to my house. We had an early dinner outside, and then I thought we could relax at home.
However, unlike usual, she didn’t stay that day.
She said she had plans with a friend past 11.
Who is that friend?
Even when I pressed her, she dodged the question. In the end, it felt like we had a bit of a fight.
I wonder if Ginny is okay?
Where did you get Ginnie's ring?
Well, um...
I borrowed it from Gabriela.
That’s strange. She never takes that ring off. Why would Gabriela have it?
You should ask Gabriela directly.
That’s not good enough.
I wonder where Ginny went after that.
Guy must be dragging her around.
You should talk to Jennifer and Meryl.
No, you need to ask Jennifer or Meryl.
Guy is definitely taking Ginny around.
Could it be that Guy took Ginny somewhere?
Why would Ginny be with Guy?
Don’t you know anything? Guy is one of the people keeping Ginny at Gabriela's place.
Guy with Ginny? No way that’s happening.
It's quite possible that Guy, who doesn't know where he's headed, could have Ginny with him.
Right now, who cares about Guy?
Do you happen to know Guy's contact information?
Why would you think I know anything about Guy?
I thought maybe you were close.
In a way, it feels like brothers, but I don't know where he is or what he's doing.
Jennifer must harbor resentment not just towards the director, but also because she has a past of having her boyfriend stolen.
I heard that's a story from many years ago.
But there are grudges that don't fade with time. Especially since Jennifer can be pretty scary, in various ways.
Sending a left hand is just the kind of thing Jennifer would do.
Meryl was almost taken from the director. No, she might have already been taken.
Taken from the director?
Oh right, I forgot to mention, the director is from the same hole as well.
So the director is with Ginny?
That's right. Of course, Meryl wouldn't be happy about that. You never know what she might do when she's angry.
There's even a possibility that Meryl has kidnapped Ginny.
Do you recognize this ring?
It looks a lot like the one worn by someone I know.
Who do you mean by someone you know?
I see, that makes sense.
I can guess what Gabriela has been talking about.
This is the same design as what Ginny was wearing. But, it wasn't given by me; it was a gift from someone else important.
This is what she wore,
san.
So, do you know where she is?
It's a truly detestable ring given to her by another man besides me.
※※※ This is a bug ※※※
Ｖ＝
